programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A wife and a mistress battle over the urn of ashes of the love of their lives

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Indian attacks continue in Colorado Springs as Hank names himself sheriff, determined to prove Sully is alive.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike, who believes she may be pregnant again, broods about Sully’s fate at the hands of the army.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Legend of the Red Dragon
programme.desc: A young father and his infant son are beset by forces of evil and corruption. They wander China, upholding their sense of honor and protecting the weak. When they are forced into combat, spectacular and hilarious fast-motion kung fu sequences follow.

programme.title: The Bodyguard from Beijing [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: A corrupt businessman commits a murder and the only witness is the girlfriend of another businessman with close connections to the Chinese government.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend [English Subtitled]
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Meltdown
programme.desc: After failing to save his wife from 'The Doctor', Kit Li begins working as a bodyguard and secret stunt double for the cowardly martial arts film star Frankie Lane.

programme.title: Hitman [English-Language Version]
programme.desc: Two hitmen, one a novice and the other a veteran with poor luck, band together to find the "King of Killers" for whom there is a large reward.

programme.title: War (2007)
programme.desc: A full-throttle, martial arts thriller, WAR stars Jet Li and Jason Statham as two adversaries set on a violent collision course in the Asian mob underground.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Seattle police had no suspects in the violent murder of grunge singer Mia Zapata. More than a decade passed before evidence collected by a prescient medical examiner could be used by forensic scientists to identify the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita’s green candle is still burning and slowly draining Tommy's powers. The only way to stop Rita from gaining the Green Ranger's power is for someone to go into the Dark Dimension and retrieve the candle.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zack is preparing Cameron, his young protégé, for the Angel Grove Junior Martial Arts Competition. As soon as the tournament is about to begin, Zack has to bail out to answer a more pressing call because Rita has sent another monster.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Trini has designed a Clean-Up Club, a club that meets once a week to clean up and recycle around Angel Grove. Rita, as usual, is not pleased and plans to pollute the planet even further by sending in her latest monster.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: This may be Rita's most diabolical play yet. She sends to Earth five exact replicas of the Power Rangers. These Rangers are evil, and they soon frame the real Power Rangers with their wrong doings.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The city gathers at Angel Grove Park for a Power Ranger celebration, the Mayor wants to thank the Rangers for their heroics in defending the city from Rita's attacks.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Zords are recharging after taking a fierce beating from Cyclopsis. Lokar and Cyclopsis set forth to destroy Angel Grove. Zordon warns the teens that their Zords will not be ready for another twelve hours.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the teens go to the park to plant saplings for their science project, Rita sends down Squatt to plant her evil Octoplant. Bulk and Skull, who are nearby, are scared by Squatt and run into a portable bathroom which is picked up by a dump truck.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: It's the return of Pudgy Pig! When the Power Rangers participate in Angel Grove’s Adopt a Pet day, a little old lady leaves them her pet pig, Norman.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Billy, who has an aversion toward fish, picnics at the park pond with Kimberly while the others go scuba diving. Aware of Billy's weakness, Rita creates her poisonous Goo Fish monster to destroy the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The teens compete in their high school Oddball Games and win the coveted Noble Lion Trophy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the Power Rangers go up to Billy's uncle's mountain resort to study for their science test, Goldar seizes the opportunity of having them altogether to call on the Crystal of Nightmares.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: While the teens are discussing the sad possibility that Ernie may have to close down the Youth Center due to financial problems, Jason shows up with an adorable stray dog.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The class project is a time capsule and all our power teens bring something significant to class to share with future generations. Mrs. Appleby contributes a photo of the Power Rangers, which makes Rita immensely jealous.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Trini is having some difficulties learning the Praying Mantis technique from kung fu expert, Master Lee. He assures her that her technique will improve with time and with some additional practice.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When all of the Power Rangers’ parents gather at the Youth Center for Parents Day, Rita seizes the opportunity to create the "Dramole Monster" which traps all the parents in her Dimension of Darkness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy, the Rangers’ only hope, is teleported to the Command Center by Alpha. Zordon reveals that he can restore Tommy's power by draining his own energy and infusing it into Tommy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When Billy gets a "B" on a test instead of his usual "A," he fears he will not make The Young Scientists of America club.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy team up to teach a self-defense class to middle-aged women. Bulk and Skull join the class -- thinking that it will be an opportunity to meet "babes."

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Bulk and Skull make a nuisance of themselves by attempting to juggle balls at a party for a group of kids, but Zack manages to scare them off with a pair of rubber snakes. An impressed Angela gives Zack a peck on the cheek.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is a contestant with a chance to win a car on a tacky horror comedy game show called Trick or Treat. Her opponent is none other than Skull.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Zack try to help young Roger make Ernie's junior soccer team. The eavesdropping Rita commands the creation of a monster to kick around the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy volunteer their time at the Youth Center to teach a Karate class to kids. Their teamwork gives Rita the idea for her latest monster, the "Slippery Shark.”

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly helps her insecure younger cousin Kelly try out for the Angel Grove Junior High cheerleading team. Kelly, however, feels that she cannot measure up to her beautiful talented cousin, who is still remembered for being an outstanding cheerleader.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy decides to try out for football but is afraid that he won’t be any good at it since he has never played football before. Ernie, a former football player himself, agrees to help Tommy train at the Juice Bar for his football tryout.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lately, Tommy has been having trouble remembering things. When Mrs. Appleby gives her class an assignment that requires the students to change their biggest faults, the teens decide to help Tommy deal with his forgetfulness.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: As Angela's birthday approaches, Zack would like to win her affections again by buying her a pair of pearl earrings.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita Repulsa's minions abandon her when an even more evil menace arrives at the Moon.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd steals the power of the Zords away from the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers obtain new Zords to defeat Piranhtis Head.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd attacks with a monster that can morph from one Power Ranger into another.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Lord Zedd casts a spell on the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly is attacked by the Bloom of Doom, a poisonous plant.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Goldar plans to steal Tommy's Green Ranger powers.

programme.title: Mystery Team
programme.desc: They were kid detectives. Now they're 18 and still solving child crimes. But when The Mystery Team is challenged to crack a murder case, they see an opportunity to finally prove themselves as real detectives once and for all.

programme.title: Chasing Amy
programme.desc: Cult comic-book artist Holden falls head-over-heels with fellow artist Alyssa, but, for that love to live, he'll need to contend with his disapproving best friend Banky, her sexuality, and his own misgivings about himself in this Kevin Smith classic.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed "Love Goddess" Judy Tenuta hosts an all new hour of standup. Join in on the insanity with Judy and four of America's funniest comics Dan Crohn, Sal Calanni, Del Harrison and Anthony Devito for a night of non-stop, uncensored comedy.

programme.title: Blue Mountain State
programme.desc: Sammy, Alex, and Craig participate (along with the rest of the school) in the Marathon Monday tradition of drinking for a full 24 hours.

programme.title: Blue Mountain State
programme.desc: Alex gets fan mail from a guy who wants Alex to date his daughter.

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Roy and Moss become juvenile delinquents for the day and have an uncomfortable experience at a shopping center.

programme.title: The IT Crowd
programme.desc: Douglas finds that marriage agrees with him...for all of two weeks. He soon finds himself in court defending himself.

programme.title: Broad City
programme.desc: Abbi and Ilana experience major wardrobe malfunctions on the way to a friend's gallery show and embark on a desperate search for a public bathroom.

programme.title: Broad City
programme.desc: Abbi has to pretend to be Ilana in order to cover her shift at the food co-op, and Ilana goes to Long Island for a very important doctor's appointment.

programme.title: Ugly Americans
programme.desc: A rabid Bat Boy takes a bite out of Mark, transforming him into New York City's latest superhero.

programme.title: Ugly Americans
programme.desc: Callie is promptly promoted after turning into a man, causing strife in her relationship with Mark.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: While Frank and the Mohican crew head to X-ray training in Cleveland, Vic gives Kevin and the band a total makeover for Kweezetoberfest.

programme.title: F is for Family
programme.desc: As Sue sets out on a star-crossed trek to the hospital, Frank races to catch a flight home - and vows to settle things with his dad once and for all.

programme.title: Freaks and Geeks
programme.desc: Lindsay's well-intentioned interference breaks up Nick's band; Sam confronts his deepest fear - showering after gym class.

programme.title: Freaks and Geeks
programme.desc: Sam and his fellow Geeks fall head over heels for a pretty transfer student; Lindsay attempts to get fake identification cards for herself and the Freaks.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: While trying to be a conformist for an assignment, Jane is selected by the cheerleaders to replace Brittany on the squad.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Light heavyweight champion Artem Vakhitov (19-5, 8 KO, fighting out of Russia), who returns to defend his title against No. 4-ranked challenger Danyo "Dibuba" Ilunga (60-13, 45 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Rewind
programme.desc: We take a look back at GLORY 54.

programme.title: Glory Kickboxing

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso culpa a la novia porque descubren su crimen. Llaman a los agentes cuando la búsqueda de trabajo de una madre se descubre. La policía enfrenta a un hombre nervioso con malas mañas.

programme.title: Cops en español

programme.title: Cops en español
programme.desc: Un sospechoso huye desesperadamente cuando hay disparos. Un padre e hija están atemorizados por un hombre que empuña un desarmador. La policía ve a muchas mujeres bellas tomando malas decisiones.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Este episodio examina casos de envenenamiento y químicos mortales, y muestra cómo los expertos forenses resuelven muertes misteriosas de hoy y del pasado.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Persona desaparecida: aproximadamente 1.8 millones de estadounidenses son reportados como desaparecidos cada año.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: El informe forense en el juicio de O. J. Simpson por homicidio: millones de personas vieron por televisión cómo el jurado emitió su veredicto. Orenthal James Simpson fue declarado no culpable de homicidio.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Botánica forense y geología: las plantas ayudan a proporcionar oxígeno y nutrientes para la existencia. El suelo es el abono de la vida. Sin embargo, ambos pueden dar pistas sobre la hora y el lugar de la muerte de una persona.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1994, cuando un vehículo blindado de Wells Fargo desapareció de un centro comercial de Glendale, Arizona, las autoridades locales y el FBI fueron de inmediato a recuperarlo, junto con la carga de casi un millón de dólares.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Al principio, cuando David Wilkey fue asesinado de un disparo en la zona rural de Virginia en 1983, pareció un accidente trágico de cacería. Un tenaz investigador de seguros sospechó de una maniobra sucia, pero no tenía pruebas concluyentes.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana del Día del Trabajador se convirtió en una pesadilla de homicidios mientras una ola de crímenes tenía aterrorizado a todo el país.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1992, una madre joven fue baleada frente a su hijo. La policía buscó respuestas, pero no encontró ninguna. El horrible crimen parecía carente de motivo y sentido, solo por azar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives' murder case involving a high-powered studio executive leads them to Hollywood; back East, Ross learns the suspect has hired her ex-husband.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder victim's ex-husband enters rehab just as police are about to arrest him; McCoy butts heads with a judge in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Law clerks discover a tape that incriminates a new suspect; Ross tricks her ex-husband into discussing a plea.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to return a parolee to prison when he believes the serial rapist committed a murder after his early release.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to sidestep a plea bargain he made with a dangerous suspect in order to see justice done.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After being a suspect himself, a key witness becomes uncooperative with prosecutors when his wedding is ruined by his arrest.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross must sort it out when the death of an editor points to a scorned girlfriend but might be a cover-up.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a former cover girl leads detectives to unearth secrets the woman was desperately trying to hide.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Probing an anti-Semitic shooting spree at a posh fund-raiser, Briscoe and Curtis unearth more-personal motives.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A delivery man's route leads detectives to his killers; prosecutors try to strike a deal when a confession is protected in the name of religion.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives follow the trail of a stolen credit card to locate two teens they suspect may have killed their newborn baby.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis crack a killing ring during the investigation of a Navy officer's murder; McCoy and Ross fight for prosecution authority.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Prosecutors question a gunman's culpability when a medical report on the victim of a drive-by shooting raises suspicions about a doctor.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A deadly robbery leads to a suburban militia; McCoy questions his safety when he faces the group leader in court.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teen model's death leads Briscoe and Curtis to her parents in Baltimore; there they enlist detectives Munch and Falsone. (Concluding on "Homicide: Life on the Street.")

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a new mother's death and the disappearance of her baby, leading prosecutors to probe the husband's role in the affair.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para divertirte al aire libre! Desde payasadas en el patio hasta patinaje, familias de dedos, seguridad en la cama, concientización sobre accidentes y faltar a clase, ¡un día de juegos y seguridad!

programme.desc: Carrie falls into a deep mine while chasing a butterfly; a drunken former miner must get his act together to rescue her.

programme.desc: Charles rushes back to Wisconsin after he learns his mother has died and his father is suicidal with grief.

programme.desc: Charles' father stays with the Ingalls, but an incident with Laura deepens his depression.

programme.desc: Charles tries to tolerate three bullies, until they assault his family.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura asks help from a blind recluse (Burl Ives) and his trapper son (Johnny Crawford) when Charles has a hunting accident.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mr. Edwards' adopted son John decides to refuse a college scholarship when Mary agrees to get married to him.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Mr. Edwards takes his deathly ill daughter to a mountain cabin to nurse her, Laura tries to help.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson casts Nellie as the lead in the children's play; a girl plots marriage for her widowed mother.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Ingalls try to help a boy who is rejected by the townsfolk because his father is an Indian warrior.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary (Melissa Sue Anderson) needs an immediate operation, so Charles (Michael Landon) leaves the farm for a dangerous high-paying job.

programme.title: The Wiggles (Wiggles Show)
programme.desc: The Wiggles relax and remember some of the fun times they have had with friends.

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Dot's excited for a geocache hunt. Dot goes overboard making Mom an elaborate thank you gift.

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Dot and Hal are excited to go swimming in the lake. Dot's devastated when a nasty cold keeps her from attending Ruby's party.

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: The gang puts on a backyard play and Dot goes overboard with special effects. Dot strays from the drone-flying rules and accidentally gets it stuck in a tree.

programme.title: Dot
programme.desc: Dot decides to give Scratch's doghouse a major renovation. Dot uncovers a mysterious map in her basement.

programme.title: Dot

programme.desc: Elias and Swifty come across a flotilla of rubber ducks, causing confusion. Helinor inspires Elias with her traveller's tales.

programme.title: Elias: Rescue Team Adventures
programme.desc: Elias's trusty compass is demobilised by a storm. When Smacky falls asleep on his way back, Elias and Helinor are called out to rescue him.

programme.title: Elias: Rescue Team Adventures
programme.desc: Elias spots a vital hospital delivery floating into the Scary Straits. Smacky's engine develops a squeak and it seems to be catching!

programme.title: Elias: Rescue Team Adventures

programme.title: Elias: Rescue Team Adventures

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Hazel discovers a toy belonging to her mom and charms it to see what will happen. Then, the Charmers put together a band to enter the local talent show.

programme.title: Little Charmers

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Hazel charms her wand to make it more powerful but breaks it instead. Then, the harmony potion meant for the frogs accidentally splashes on Hazel.

programme.title: Little Charmers

programme.desc: Matlock finds himself in a legal dilemma: his client stuns the courtroom with a confession, and then, saying that government agents had persuaded her to do so, tries to recant it.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.desc: When a renowned author is murdered, Matlock defends the accused – the subject of a biography the victim was writing – only to encounter a disturbing revelation about his client midway through the trial.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.desc: Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.desc: Barney assumes the identity of a powerful psychic from a Caribbean island kingdom in order to hypnotize a defecting crime syndicate leader into revealing his super secret list of government officials on the take.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets Natasha, a famous oboeist. She shows pictures of her children and says she expresses her feelings for them through her music. Prince Tuesday is considering getting sick so that his parents will stay home from work.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bandage on his left hand. He pulls back the bandage to show that his hand is still there. Ana scraped her paw but does not want a bandage. Lady Aberlin is able to convince her otherwise.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make adhesive bandages. Prince Tuesday is looking for someone to play with but all of his friends are busy. At the suggestion of King Friday, he pretends that his rag doll has come to life.

programme.desc: Folksinger Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers with her ukulele and shares songs her father enjoyed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men. After hearing the sound effect from the laughing box, Lady Aberlin sees how long neighbors take to laugh. Eric Kloss makes different sounds using a wind synthesizer.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers says that the bean plant he planted a few days ago has grown. Robert Troll is the only one who can communicate with the “big thing.” He learns that it wants a blanket; the blanket causes it to sprout a stem and leaves.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln's family forms a band when he signs them up for a talent show; Lincoln's mother offers to take him to the dental office where she works; his sisters go to work with their father.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Luna pranks the entire household every year on April Fools' Day, but this year Lincoln has a plan to avoid her pranks; the Loud children make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for their mother, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde must start a business for a class assignment, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise; the children are determined to out-sell each other at the Loud family's annual garage sale.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln worries that he has lost his manliness from growing up with sisters, so he and Clyde decide to go camping; Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but Lori gets in trouble when he starts to ask for favors.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mother signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot; Lincoln becomes a hypochondriac when Lucy reads his fortune and predicts that his day will end in disaster.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had 10 brothers instead of 10 sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality; Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but her siblings are reluctant to let in a tattle tale.

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Aparecen nuevos vecinos extraños en la casa de enfrente y Perro, obsesionado con los cómics de ciencia ficción, cree que son alienígenas. / Luego de estar despiertos toda la noche, Perro se queda dormido en el día durante una entrevista.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato audiciona para la producción musical de Abe Lincoln: superestrella, pero es abatido cuando Perro obtiene el papel principal y él tiene que ser el burro. /Perro descubre que otro canino violó su toma de agua preferida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro está abatido al saber que sus huesos de leche preferidos están prohibidos en Nearburg, mientras que Gato tiene una idea para ganar dinero. / Perro come demasiados pasteles de nuez y comienza a crecerle un árbol de nuez en la cabeza.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato tienen la misión de encontrar a la Ardilla que arruinó los vegetales de Gato y robó los huesos de Perro. / Perro vuelve a sus viejos trucos, esta vez, persiguiendo a un avión que está aterrizando en el Aeropuerto.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato saca un libro viejo de los gatos en la historia, para enseñarle a Perro sobre la realeza felina en Egipto. / Tito encuentra a Gato en el acto de querer leer el diario de Perro y lo chantajea, convirtiéndolo así en su esclavo personal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El frustrado gato, compra videos educativos para su perro / Winslow se despierta una mañana y se entera de que CatDog ha abandonado su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro lleva a Gato a la Escuela de Payasos. / Gato gana un concurso, pero Tito intenta impedir que reciba su premio. / Perro se gana un pez y lo llama Verónica.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En un esfuerzo por conseguir que Perro la mire, Shriek, la perra grasosa, va a la escuela de encantos de Randolph. / Perro, sin darse cuenta, salva a Rancio, el conejo, de ser aplastado por la hamburguesa más grande del mundo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos está cansado de que la gente bromee con su pelo colorado, y le pide a Tommy que se lo tiña negro con la tintura del Abuelo. Cuando Firulais se pierde, Hugo trata de reemplazarlo con una serie nueva de juguetes.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica convence a los bebés de que Carlitos es un extraterrestre. Después de que Chas le habla a Carlitos sobre los gérmenes, Carlitos tiene temor de tocar cosas por miedo a tener contacto con gérmenes.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlota anuncia que está embarazada, y Angélica teme ser olvidada una vez que nazca el bebé. Los Rugrats se imaginan que son héroes para recuperar los muñecos de su programa de televisión favorito que Angélica les quitó.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cansados del maltrato de Angélica, los Rugrats van a jugar con otro niño en el parque llamado Josh, quien termina siendo peor que Angélica. Angélica decide denunciar a sus padres cuando ellos tratan de hacerle comer brócoli.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats van a la casa de Boris y Minka para pasar las Pascuas y, por accidente, se quedan todos encerrados en el ático. Para pasar el tiempo, Boris les cuenta a los bebés la historia de Moisés.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando Hugo rompe el televisor, los Rugrats usan una caja vacía para crear sus propios programas. Angélica les dice a los bebés que el cielo se está cayendo y que está llegando el fin del mundo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos adopta una mascota, el insecto Melville. Cuando Melville muere, a Carlitos le cuesta mucho aceptarlo y pasa por todos los procesos del duelo. Angélica les pide a los Rugrats que la mantengan alejada de las galletas.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos se enamora de una nueva niña, Megan, y demuestran su cariño molestándose. Los Rugrats están felices de que Angélica se va a mudar lejos, hasta que Tommy comienza a recordar el primer día que todos se conocieron.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: El comportamiento de Firulais se vuelve un poco extraño cuando adopta unos gatitos y los esconde en su casa. / Carlitos se contagia de varicela, y Angélica les dice a los bebés que es una enfermedad que te convierte en pollo.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Mientras escuchan un programa de radio con el Abuelo, los Rugrats juegan a ser detectives y se preponen resolver un misterio. / Angélica convence a los Rugrats de que puede predecir el futuro, y les pide juguetes y galletas como pago.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo y Julio compiten entre sí grabando los momentos más divertidos de sus hijos para ganar un concurso de un programa de televisión. / Los Rugrats compiten en contra de los bebés McNulty para salvar la medalla de oro de Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats batallan contra Angélica en un lavadero de carros. / Tommy y su guía mística Sabu, cruzan el patio de los Pickles en medio de una ola de calor, para llegar a la “tierra de las aguas” y combatir su sed.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats son obligados a ayudar a Angélica en su puesto de limonadas. / Carlitos y Fili descubren que los vestidos son más frescos que los pantalones.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hechizados con un cuento del Abuelo, los Rugrats llegan a una feria medieval y creen que se encuentran en la Tierra de las Hadas. / Después de visitar al médico, Carlitos adquiere un sentido del olfato superior y se siente sumamente libre.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats se hacen amigos de un pavo en el día de Acción de Gracias.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos decide enseñarle a Firulais a usar el inodoro. / Angélica toma crédito por el arte abstracto de los Rugrats y empieza ser considerada como una artista extraordinaria.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats creen que la neblina matutina que rodea la casa es el deseo hecho realidad de Tommy de estar en las nubes. / Los Rugrats van en su primer viaje en barco y tienen la misión de salvar a Cynthia, cuando ésta se cae al agua.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los Rugrats deciden deshacerse del fantasma que creen que vive en el colchón del Abuelo. / La minivan de Carlota deja de funcionar de camino a un concierto de los Dummi Bears.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: A Tommy le da hipo y Angélica se ofrece a asustarlo para que se le quite. / Cuando llega el otoño, los Rugrats creen que los árboles están enfermos, al ver que las hojas se caen y cambian de color. Tommy encabeza una campaña para curarlos.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Es la hora de la limpieza y los Rugrats creen que las motas de polvo son unos conejos que están en su contra. / Angélica debe ir a preescolar, en donde tiene problemas para compartir su juguete favorito con otros niños.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica planea conseguir los dulces de los bebés fingiendo que su muñeca Cynthia ha sido secuestrada. / Los Rugrats se separan de sus padres en un centro comercial e intentan reunir de vuelta a una tortuga con su padre.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp regains consciousness after his vicious beating, but he’s not at all happy to hear Luffy’s plans for the Going Merry. Temper flares and challenges are issued as the Straw Hats face their most uncertain hour.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Usopp battle to a brutal standstill in a heartbreaking duel between men who once called each other family. Can the Straw Hats find the strength to carry on without their sniper?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hat split is overshadowed by an assassination attempt on the mayor of Water Seven! Luffy is eager to investigate, but the leader of the Franky Family is about to reappear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s grudge match with Franky gets serious when his opponent turns out to be a cyborg! Iceberg awakes from his slumber only to hurl heinous accusations at the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is branded an assassin and attacked by Iceberg’s strongest men! Meanwhile, Sanji and Chopper attempt to warn Usopp about an impending natural disaster!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Water Seven search for the Straw Hats and a devastating storm threatens to sink the city. Chopper and Sanji pick up Robin’s trail, but they aren’t prepared for what they’ll find.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp prepares to ride out the storm aboard the Going Merry, Franky hatches a plan to force Luffy into a rematch, and the Straw Hats set out to uncover Robin’s dark secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin and her CP9 brethren seek to settle unfinished business with Iceberg. The Straw Hats have a plan to clear their names, but the assassins are one step ahead of them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes his long-awaited entrance, Iceberg has a shocking surprise in store for Robin, and the true identities of the masked assassins of CP9 are finally revealed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: CP9 listens to Iceberg’s blood to learn the location of the blueprints, Usopp has another run-in with Franky and the remaining Straw Hats – plus a new friend – race to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang come face to face with Robin and her CP9 comrades. The rubberman is prepared to fight for his friend, but he’s never faced foes like this!

programme.desc: Franky tries to convince Usopp that there’s no hope for the Going Merry, but the sniper – inspired by a mysterious moment from the past – remains loyal to his beloved boat

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky’s backstory continues! The sea train is a success, and it looks like Tom’s life is spared! Unfortunately, a government spy is searching for a reason to investigate Tom, and Franky provides the ammunition!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Chris and Robbie convert one of their rigs to run on veggie oil and end up making a bet with the shipper--beat the tight, cross-country deadline and do it all on free grease.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: After almost losing his load, Roy's forced to ask Jennifer for help, but gets more than he bargained for when her "favor" turns into etiquette lessons.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Marc's on the sidelines with big rig repairs until his buddy joins in the bidding ... but everyone else gets the last laugh when he's forced to rent a box truck.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage battle to rescue a 130-ton Road Train from a flooded river crossing, while Shaun and Sarah dig deep to uncover a bounty of buried salvage.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage embark on a titanic 4-day rescue mission to resurrect a 20-ton, 40 ft yacht that sank 12 years ago half a kilometer offshore. In the most epic challenge of their career, the crew face up to the ultimate salvage mission impossible.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy's arch-nemesis, auctioneer Patrick Pecker, calls an auction on Weston Road. While Roy seeks to lift the curse, Ursula works her charm. Meanwhile, Bogart reads Paul the riot-shirt, and Rick and Cindy get lost.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Ursula hopes her pet chinchilla will bring her luck at an auction in East Gwillimbury, but little Monty has ideas of his own. Rick and Cindy get into watersports, Paul and Bogart make a virtue of chastity, and Roy comes to work in his pajamas.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The buyers head to Utopia hoping that the auction lives up to its name. Roy is flush with cash and is not afraid to bribe. Ursula runs afoul of some fowl, Rick and Cindy must atone for their sins, and Paul and Bogart uncover some true dough.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: New buyer Tommy is larger than life and looking for a big score at an auction in Brampton. Roy arrives with an intern, eager to mentor for free labor. Rick and Cindy hedge their bets and Ursula would rather be shopping.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Jeff Schwarz, aka “The Liquidator,” is back and is causing as much chaos as possible.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: For the professional bidders, Aurora is a symphony of minor letdowns and major scores.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Ursula goes all in for a fashion locker in Rick and Cindy’s hometown of Newmarket.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy suits up in full army gear to declare war on the buyers in Scarborough.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage battle to rescue a 130-ton Road Train from a flooded river crossing, while Shaun and Sarah dig deep to uncover a bounty of buried salvage.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk loses his memory and is proclaimed a God while trapped on a planet whose inhabitants are descended from Northwestern Native Americans.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise reaches a Federation colony where the adults have all killed themselves but the children play without care.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Miranda Jones, a telepath who studied mental disciplines on Vulcan, arrives with Ambassador Kolos, a Medusan.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When coming to a xenophobic isolationist planet, Captain Kirk and his landing party are punished for trespassing.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When the Enterprise brings aboard Klingon prisoners, an alien entity pits both sides against each other in an ever-escalating struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: At the same time McCoy discovers that he has a year to live, the U.S.S. Enterprise encounters the asteroid Yonada which is determined to be artificially propelled.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando un despiadado genio conocido como Khan (Benedict Cumberbatch) declara una guerra en solitario contra la Federación, el capitán Kirk, Spock y la intrépida tripulación del U.S.S. Enterprise emprenden la mayor cacería de la historia.

programme.title: Star Trek II: la ira de Khan
programme.desc: Es el siglo XXIII. La Federación Unida de Planetas Enterprise está haciendo maniobras de entrenamiento de rutina, y el almirante James T. Kirk parece resignado al hecho de que esta inspección puede ser la última misión espacial de su carrera.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, Sisko must assume the role of his dead counterpart in order to save the mirror version of his late wife.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Garak's shop mysteriously explodes, launching Odo on an investigation to determine who is trying to kill the Cardassian exile--and why.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: On the eve of a Romulan/Cardassian attack against the Dominion, Garak may have to prove his loyalty to his former mentor by eliminating Odo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko builds a new version of an ancient Bajoran space vessel in an effort to prove the truth behind an 800-year-old legend.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark returns to his home planet to confront his mother, who has broken the Ferengi law prohibiting females from earning a profit.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sent to Bajor on a mission against her former leader, Kira ends up joining him as a fugitive.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Jadzia Dax must come to terms with her feelings of inferiority when she meets her past hosts in an ancient Trill rite of closure.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: One of Odo's people tricks Sisko and the crew into actions that could start a war in the Alpha Quadrant.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When the Klingon Empire ends its peace treaty with the Federation, Sisko must help Klingon Starfleet officer Worf decide where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When the Klingon Empire ends its peace treaty with the Federation, Sisko must help Klingon Starfleet officer Worf decide where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Held prisoner by a group under the leadership of rebel Jem'Hadar, Bashir and O'Brien clash over Bashir's desire to help their captors escape Dominion rule.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When a tragic accident causes Sisko to vanish before his son's eyes, young Jake begins a lifelong obsession to bring him back.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Forced to bring Dukat along on a personal mission, Kira discovers the real reason her nemesis wants to accompany her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Jadzia Dax must choose between her feelings and the rules of Trill society when she is reunited with the wife of one of Dax's previous hosts.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with Star Trek, the incredible story of a young crew's maiden voyage onboard the most advanced starship ever created: the U.S.S. Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: When a ruthless mastermind, Khan (Benedict Cumberbatch) declares a one-man war on the Federation, Captain Kirk (Chris Pine), Spock (Zachary Quinto), and the crew of the U.S.S. Enterprise set out on their most explosive manhunt of all time.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: On a rescue mission, the USS Enterprise is attacked by Krall, a warlord sworn against the Federation. Crashed on an uncharted world, the crew must join forces with Jaylah, a rebellious alien warrior, to escape and stop Krall from triggering all-out war.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard and the crew suffer from conflicting emotions when the Enterprise rescues a critically-injured Borg.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Geordi and Ro are pronounced dead after a transporting maneuver from a distressed Romulan ship goes awry.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a mysterious accident, Picard wakes up living the life of another person on a faraway planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Data learns of his own death in late-19th-century San Francisco, a freak accident transports him back to that period.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise crew travels between the 19th and 24th centuries in an attempt to prevent Data's death in 19th century San Francisco.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A young Enterprise engineer is forced to confront his paralyzing fear of being transported.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Troi is drastically transformed when a visiting ambassador secretly uses her to achieve his aims.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Trapped in limbo for 75 years, Star Trek's Scotty awakens to join the Next Generation in the 24th century.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Commander Riker's inability to fall asleep begins to show in other members of the crew in other forms, putting the Enterprise on the trail of a mystery.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When an honor student in the medical field is assigned to the Enterprise in an internship manner, she begins to demonstrate powers of the Q, prompting you-know-who to show up.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: An emergency beam out renders four crewmen down to childhood shortly before renegade Ferengi take over the Enterprise and offload the adults.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A Holodeck fantasy goes awry, sending Worf and his son into a Wild West showdown with a villain who's a dead ringer for Data.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Data risks Picard and Geordi's lives in order to protect another living machine.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After resigning his command to participate in a dangerous secret mission, Captain Picard is taken hostage by the Cardassians.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor publishes a holo-novel based on his Voyager experiences which scandalizes the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager recovers a long-lost space probe which has caused terrible radiation damage on a distant planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven and Chakotay stumble upon a race of primitive humanoids isolated from technological progress by an energy barrier.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix is faced with the decision of a lifetime when Voyager locates a tribe of exiled Talaxians on a distant asteroid.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway is held hostage by aliens who force the Doctor to help them steal Voyager's warp core.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Voyager's quest to return home is aided by a visitor from the future – Admiral Kathryn Janeway.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway risks Voyager's shortcut home in order to destroy the Borg and save millions of lives.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway's actions could cost the crew their chance of reaching home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The pupil becomes the teacher when a Borg drone is born on Voyager and Seven of Nine instructs him in the ways of humanity.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A need to test herself leads Torres down a path of self-destruction.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Voyager crew discovers an alien training ground for the destruction of Earth.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix balks at telling Naomi that her mother and others have gone missing on an away mission.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Fifteen years after making a horrible mistake, Kim attempts to rewrite history.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Seven experiences the Borg version of multiple personality disorder.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Col. Sheppard and his team locate Dr. Carson Beckett on an alien planet where he is treating a small group of survivors of the Hoffan plague. But that same evening, a party of Wraith warriors arrives, threatening total annihilation.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A newly formed galactic coalition extends an invitation to Lt. Col. John Sheppard and his team to represent Atlantis at their next meeting. But on arrival, the team is immediately detained and must stand trial for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Atlantis is suddenly plunged into darkness, with only the top tier of the central tower unaffected. As Sheppard and McKay attempt to get to the top level, they discover that a force field has been established to prevent them from gaining access.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While Richard Woolsey (Robert Picardo) struggles to keep his position as the leader of Atlantis, and McKay (David Hewlett) and Zelenka (David Nykl) investigate a mysterious find, Sheppard is captured by an old enemy with plans to invade the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When the Atlantis team is given two weeks of vacation leave, Dr. Rodney McKay reluctantly accepts an invitation by his former rival, Malcolm Tunney, to attend a scientific demonstration that he claims will be the solution to global warming.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team prepares for the worst as board a Wraith hive ship over Atlantis. They're surprised to find the Wraith crew in stasis when a malfunction on the hive ship releases the remaining crew… who have been cannibalizing one another for food.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Jennifer Keller is observed behaving very strangely, extensive testing reveals nothing abnormal. But McKay’s investigation leads him to suspect that Dr. Keller and Neela Casol, a notorious criminal, have switched consciousnesses.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When a military research base is attacked, a small group of civilians and military personnel escape on a ship into deep space. But divisions emerge between those who want to attempt a return to Earth and those who want to remain aboard the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After secretly contacting Homeworld Command, Dr. Rush (Robert Carlyle) claims that he has been placed in charge by Gen. O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and that there is no hope of returning to Earth. But his assertions are soon questioned.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As the Ori's all out assault. looms closer, lieutenant Colonel Cameron Mitchell and Daniel Jackson race to locate a device that will obliterate the evil enemy once and for all. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As their battle with the Ori continues, the team struggles to reunite and formulate a plan to defeat their enemy. Vala (Claudia Black), still aboard an Ori ship, watches as her newly born child quickly ages and is molded to lead the Ori army.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a mission to find a weapon that will defeat their powerful foe, the team finds a planet whose inhabitants were killed by a mysterious illness, and unwittingly fall victim to the illness themselves. Starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Less is mostly more in Brea; Rene swings for the fences on a costly gamble; Brandi has to dig through trash but really puts her heart into it nonetheless; Ivy and Pops clear up confusion over a massive, mysterious mechanism.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy confuses profit with prophet but still manages to climb his way to success; Kenny tries to honor the history of San Bernardino, Calif., recording a win along the way; Brandi shows her literary prowess volume by volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a regular father and son shootout in Victorville, Calif., as Ivy and Pops try to prove who among them is the most profitable; Brandi's secret weapon lands her more than she bargained for, but luckily Kenny is there to brighten her day.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry rolls up to Riverside, Calif., with his own masked bidder, and the two develop a winning strategy; Brandi and Danielle's mystery balls take them to South America... sort of; Rene needs a cleanse after going through his risqué room.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi does everything she can to stay positive; Darrell finds a unit with some vintage totes, while Gunter plays on Rene's last nerve.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: San Bernardino, Calif., brings out the warrior in Ivy, who goes up against an upstart buyer; Kenny has his eye on a locker that leaves him needing a massage; Lisa angles for a smaller unit but ends up with the catch of the day.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Tucked away in his storage Man Cave, Barry Weiss and Kenny sit down with Brandi and the Dotsons to relive old times, find out what they've been doing and gather intelligence, as he plans his return to the auction game.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod takes Brandi to an auction on her birthday; Darrell tries to find another "All Ten" locker; Rene stands his ground to protect his honor; Mary brings in her pal from Texas to put her California counterparts in their place.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily brings her mother along; Darrell wastes no time finding an advantage; Ivy and Ivy Jr. clean up with their locker; Kenny gets some advice from a music legend; Shana and Edwina settle for thrifting what's in front of them.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave sees his profits grow, among other things, in Torrance, Calif.; Mary finds clothes that don't fit her, which turns out to be a good thing; Kenny takes a chance at being an early bird, but winds up looking more like a dodo.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Recently separated, Brandi and Jarrod find themselves at the same auction, and tensions flare; she gets the Laura treatment, and he regresses to his childhood self; Ivy schools Ivy Jr., who needs to find his footing.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The King of Montebello can't wait to see what he can drum up this time around; Rene sniffs out a great locker, stepping over the competition to get it; Kenny does his best to fire up his profits; Brandi can't see the potential in the units.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tries to reclaim the title of King of Whittier but has trouble amassing any shillings; Ivy & Ivy brave the cold to find their fortunes; Lisa finally graduates to full-fledged buyer, finding an unlikely mentor along the way.

programme.desc: The King of Montebello can't wait to see what he can drum up this time around; Rene sniffs out a great locker, stepping over the competition to get it; Kenny does his best to fire up his profits; Brandi can't see the potential in the units.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tries to reclaim the title of King of Whittier but has trouble amassing any shillings; Ivy & Ivy brave the cold to find their fortunes; Lisa finally graduates to full-fledged buyer, finding an unlikely mentor along the way.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Less is mostly more in Brea; Rene swings for the fences on a costly gamble; Brandi has to dig through trash but really puts her heart into it nonetheless; Ivy and Pops clear up confusion over a massive, mysterious mechanism.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy confuses profit with prophet but still manages to climb his way to success; Kenny tries to honor the history of San Bernardino, Calif., recording a win along the way; Brandi shows her literary prowess volume by volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With something now stalking the ships, the captains debate their options, testing their loyalty to one another against their duty to their crews.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A cunning attack on the ships proves the men are not battling an ordinary bear and that the region's Inuit culture may hold a key to their survival.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A strange illness begins to show itself while another more familiar one jeopardizes the expedition's most valuable resource - its captain's judgment.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: With the end of their provisions in sight, officers contemplate an 800-mile walkout while planning a party to raise the men's worsening spirits.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the men begin their long march south for rescue, a series of shocking events underscores how vulnerable and exposed their situation has become.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The death of an officer under mysterious circumstances creates paranoia among the men. Crozier discovers some of the crew may be considering mutiny.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Hope comes in strange forms, and the question of what the men are willing to do to survive begins to be settled in both noble and horrifying ways.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The expedition's epic journey reaches its climax as men find themselves in a final confrontation with the Inuit mythology they've trespassed into.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: In 1941, Chester Nakayama is caught between his insular Japanese American neighborhood on Terminal Island and his current all-American life. Extreme circumstances push his community and personal life to the brink, all while someone watches closely.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: After Pearl Harbor, the Terminal Islanders are evicted from their homes and must find shelter elsewhere. While Henry, separated from his family, faces injustice at the hands of the government, Chester engages in a paranoid search for answers.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: As the Terminal Islanders adjust to their new surroundings, Chester tries to provide for his family, while fending off the evil that follows him. Henry reels from the trauma of his imprisonment. Asako sees bad omens. Amy takes up a new job.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester, in search of a better life, is treated with hostility by his fellow Americans. Luz hopes to be accepted by Henry and Asako in their new home as the Japanese American community celebrates Obon, a festival to commemorate the dead.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Japanese Americans are forced to undertake a humiliating exercise that divides the community. Chester comes face to face with a man who forces him to question his very nature. Luz, stricken by grief, is forced to make an important choice.
